title: Matka King
overview: In this fictional tale set in 1960s Mumbai, an enterprising cotton trader who craves legitimacy and respect, starts a new gambling game dubbed ‘Matka’, that takes the city by storm and democratizes a terrain previously reserved for the rich and elite.

tv.episodeTitle: Tera Pyaar Triple Paana, Mera Pyaar Kabootar Daana
tv.episodeOverview: Survival requires innovation as the government launches a rival scheme to dismantle Brij's influence. Forced to think outside the box, Brij expands his reach across India, but success demands a heavy sacrifice. Trust fractures within the inner circle, and an enemy strikes where it hurts most when unbridled greed determines to ruin everything.
